overview.description: The Franklin Municipal Income ETF (FTMU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF that provides exposure to investment grade US municipal bonds with maturities of three years or longer. FTMU was launched on Oct 27, 2025 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
